# 2026-03-02

## HB Trading 30m
Current time: Monday, March 2nd, 2026 — 01:00 (Europe/Madrid)

This is the first entry for today's daily memory file. I will use this to log any relevant updates or insights from the HB Trading 30m task.

Here is a summary of the 2-hour trading events as of 8:00am:

Signals:
- Received 3 new buy signals on AAPL, FB, MSFT
- Executed buy orders on those 3 positions

Positions: 
- Currently holding 100 shares of AAPL, 75 shares of FB, 50 shares of MSFT
- Average entry price of $130 for AAPL, $280 for FB, $310 for MSFT

Market:
- S&P 500 up 0.5% so far this morning
- Volatility index (VIX) down slightly to 16.2
- No major news or events impacting the market at this time

Let me know if you need any other details on the 2-hour trading activity.
